To measure gamma rays
The uncertainties on the Gamma(gamma) are dominated by
the uncertainties on Gamma(n), which sum up to about
30% in the cases of 1964- and 1975-keV resonances. In
other three resonances, the uncertainties on the
Gamma(gamma) are due to the uncertainties on Gamma(n)
and intensities of gamma rays. The uncertainty on the
individual Gamma(gamma) ranged from 20 to 100%.
Data taken from Table II, p327 in reference
